summary: Monetization Page (rebuilt to replicate adsgupta-health.preview.emergentagent.com) - All 12 requested features tested and verified. Page successfully displays Neural Oracle panel with curated content, product carousel, and chat functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Neural Oracle chat responses are MOCKED (simulated) - no real LLM integration
Video ad countdown and skip functionality work correctly
Rotating text on Neural Oracle floater cycles every 3 seconds as designed
test_credentials: No auth required - public demo page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monetization page fully tested at /monetization route. All features working: Header with hamburger/AdsGupta AI title/user icon, two-column layout, sidebar banner ad, sidebar video ad with skip countdown, Neural Oracle floating button with rotating text/AI badge/Online indicator, Neural Oracle panel with 'Myth vs Reality' header, 5 curated content cards with emojis, Recommended Products carousel (9 products + video ad), chat input with attachment/mic/send buttons, and 'Back to Showcase Hub' button.
passed_tests: 1. Header with hamburger menu, 'AdsGupta AI' cyan title, user icon - PASS
2. Two-column layout: article left, sticky sidebar (w-80) right - PASS
3. Sidebar banner ad with 'Discover Premium Coconut Products' - PASS
4. Sidebar video ad with 'Skip in 5s' countdown (counts down to 'Skip Ad') - PASS
5. Neural Oracle floating button with rotating text (cycles through product names and prompts) - PASS
6. Neural Oracle button has 'AI' badge and green 'Online' indicator - PASS
7. Clicking AI prompt chip opens Neural Oracle panel (slides up from bottom) - PASS
8. Panel has 'Myth vs Reality: A quick breakdown' header with subtitle - PASS
9. Panel has 5 Curated content cards with emojis (🤔, ✨, 🔥, 💚, 🥥), views, likes, 'Read more' - PASS
10. Panel has Recommended Products carousel (9 products with prices ₹140-₹599, ratings, 'Buy Now'/'Check Out' buttons) - PASS
11. Panel has Neural Oracle chat input with 'Ask the Neural Engine...' placeholder, paperclip/mic/send buttons - PASS
12. 'Back to Showcase Hub' button visible and fixed at top-left - PASS
additional_verified_features: Inline video ad in article with 'AD' badge and skip countdown - PASS
Article content with 'Coconut oil' cyan hyperlinks - PASS
Tags section (coconut oil, weight management, health myths, nutrition) - PASS
AI prompt chips (5 buttons with emojis) at bottom of article - PASS
Chat functionality: User message appears, MOCKED AI response received after 1.5s delay - PASS
'Upgrade to AI Pro' button in panel - PASS
Sponsored banner in panel carousel with 'SPONSORED' badge - PASS
Loading ad placeholders in article - PASS

mocked_integrations.Neural Oracle chat responses: MOCKED - Returns preset response about MCTs and metabolism after 1.5 second delay, no real LLM integration

design_review.overall: Dark theme with cyan accents correctly implemented
positives: Cyan accent color on title, links, buttons, and interactive elements
Sticky sidebar maintains position while scrolling
Neural Oracle panel slides up smoothly with spring animation
Product cards have proper spacing, ratings, and pricing
